Row.Text: Start with Eureka for Bronze Working and Iron Working. After researching Political Philosophy, melee units gain +3 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength. Encampment and its buildings have no maintenance cost. Cities with a Barracks or Stable but without a Commercial Hub or Harbor gain +1 [ICON_TradeRoute] Trade Route.
开局获得铸铜术和炼铁术的尤里卡。研究政治哲学后，近战单位+3 [ICON_Strength] 战斗力。军营及其建筑不需要维护费。拥有兵营或马厩但没有商业中心和港口的城市+1 [ICON_TradeRoute] 贸易路线。
Respects civilizations with strong military forces. Dislikes civilizations that neglect their armed forces.
尊重拥有强大军事力量的文明。不喜欢忽视武装力量的文明。
